provider_name.title: Provider Name
provider_name.description: Trading name of the energy provider (e.g. 'EnergyAustralia').

provider_abn.title: Provider ABN
provider_abn.description: Australian Business Number of the energy provider (e.g. '99 086 014 968').

account_holder_name.title: Account Holder Name
account_holder_name.description: Full name of the account holder as shown on the bill (e.g. 'Miss S Sample').

account_number.title: Account Number
account_number.description: Customer account number as shown on the bill (e.g. '1234 567 890').

service_address.title: Service Address
service_address.description: Physical supply address used for Proof of Address verification.

street.title: Street
street.description: Street number and name (e.g. '37 Sample Road').

issue_date.title: Bill Issue Date
issue_date.description: Date the bill was issued in DD MMM YYYY format (e.g. '04 Aug 2023').

due_date.title: Bill Due Date
due_date.description: Payment due date in DD MMM YYYY format, typically 14-21 days after issue (e.g. '21 Aug 2023').

total_amount_due.title: Total Amount Due
total_amount_due.description: Total payable amount in AUD including GST as shown on the bill (e.g. '$538.77').

pages.title: Bill Pages
pages.description: List of template page files in page order. Pages marked changeable=false are copied from template without AI generation.

items.title: Page Entry
items.description: A single page of the bill template.

file.title: File Path
file.description: Relative path to the template image for this page.

changeable.title: Changeable
changeable.description: True if this page contains data fields that need AI generation. False if the page is static and copied as-is.
